title: First of several submits for buildah manpages
body: This creates the directory, the Makefile and the first manpage for buildah.  I wanted to get the first one in place to make sure I was doing the right formatting and to make sure I wouldn't break a build/test process somewhere.

comments.body:
Overall this looks good, I am happy you did it in Markdown, I think we should have links to the man pages from the README.md so that going to the github page can take you to describe how the subcommands work.

Only concern, I have is that I believe we are still working on the CLI so changes to Manpages are going to happen until we settle the CLI.
Tom Please review my other pull requests for CLI, I think we need to get together with @nalind tomorrow and continue talking about how a user would use this tool

Thanks Dan.  I think I've reviewed all the other related commits.  Ok to merge this in now gents?  I anticipate needing to go back and touch up this particular .md as things evolve, I just want to get structure set up if that's ok.
